Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'S Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed. Moving party did not file a proof of service as required by CRC 3.1300c). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/hk
